description: Follow-up phases of the c11mux Tier 1 persistence plan (`docs/c11mux-tier1-persistence-plan.md`). Phase 1 (PR #10), Phase 1.5 (PR #12), and Phase 2 (PR #13) have all shipped. This parent tracks what remains: Phase 3 completes Tier 1a durability, Phases 4-5 add Tier 1b recovery UX (re-justify at the 1a/1b boundary), and the cleanup removes the one-release rollback safety nets. See subtasks for scope per phase.
title: Tier 1 persistence: remaining work (Phases 3-5 + cleanup)
